canonical_question: How do I allocate marketing budget by stage and sales motion — minimum viable budgets per channel, ROI expectations?
aliases: What percentage of revenue should a startup spend on marketing?
Startup marketing budget breakdown by channel and stage
Minimum viable marketing spend per channel for SaaS startups
Marketing budget allocation PLG vs sales-led vs hybrid

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: Gartner 2025 CMO survey confirmed budgets flat at 7.7% of revenue for large enterprises

constraints: Marketing budget must be tied to revenue stage — pre-revenue startups should budget from runway, not revenue percentages
No channel produces reliable results below its minimum viable budget; underfunding creates waste, not savings
Paid channels require 2-4 weeks of learning budget before judging ROI
SEO and content require 6-12 months before meaningful returns
CAC must stay below 1/3 of LTV

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs a high-level marketing strategy, not budget numbers
User needs to choose between PLG and sales-led before budgeting
User needs overall startup financial planning, not just marketing

inputs_needed.question: What is the primary sales motion?
What is the total monthly marketing budget?
Which channel has shown the most traction so far?

depends_on.label: Overall financial model that marketing budget feeds into

related_to.label: CAC benchmarks to validate channel performance
LTV:CAC targets to calibrate spend levels
